View full details

Product Description

NISSAN 350Z Super Leggera Body Kit

Transform the stance of your Nissan 350Z with the Super Leggera body kit — engineered for a motorsport-inspired look with precise OEM+ fitment. Each component works as a cohesive system for a complete, factory-quality exterior transformation.

Parts Included

  • Front Diffuser (Carbon)
  • Front Fender
  • Fuel Cover
  • Rear Fender
  • Rear Spoiler

Complete Body Kit option includes all of the above at a bundled price.

Vehicle Compatibility

  • Nissan 350Z

Key Features

  • ✔️ Aggressive Super Leggera styling tailored for the Nissan 350Z
  • ✔️ Precision-engineered for seamless OEM+ fitment with factory mounting points
  • ✔️ Integrated rear spoiler for added downforce and visual balance
  • ✔️ Extended fender coverage for a wider, more aggressive track stance
  • ✔️ Gloss or matte UV-protected clear coat finish available
  • ✔️ Suitable for street builds, shows, and track day setups

Materials Available

  • Fiberglass (FRP) — FRP composite construction. Lightweight and ready to paint to any colour.
  • Matte Carbon / Gloss Carbon — Vacuum infused carbon fiber composite. Ready to install, no paint required.
  • Forged Carbon — Vacuum infused forged carbon composite. Premium structured finish, maximum rigidity.
  • Kevlar — Vacuum infused kevlar composite. Ultra lightweight with extreme impact resistance.

Production Lead Time

Most parts are built to order. Estimated production time is 3–5 weeks depending on configuration and material selection.

🔥 Elevate your Nissan 350Z with the ETi Super Leggera Body Kit — precision crafted for drivers who refuse to blend in. 🛒 Order today and experience the perfect blend of aggressive style and quality fitment!
